stemHtml: An aircraft is on final approach to land on RWY 04 in Stansted. In order to maintain the desired traffic spacing, the controller instructs the crew to reduce the horizontal speed. When the controller requests the speed control, the aircraft should be at a distance greater than (1) _____ from the threshold. Furthermore, speed adjustments should NOT exceed plus/minus (2) _____ IAS (Indicated Airspeed).
